data.content: Let's start building the auth system for MoltAI
I'll set up the authentication system. Let me start with the OAuth2 provider configuration...
Also need to migrate the database to Postgres 15

data.summary:
Started building the auth system. Set up OAuth2 flow structure and identified the need for a PG15 migration. Both threads are active.

[THREAD_META]
main: building OAuth2 authentication system for MoltAI platform
sub1: setting up Google + GitHub federation
sub2: planning Postgres 15 upgrade from 14.x
sub3: registering OAuth redirect URLs
[/THREAD_META]

kaspiett.main: building OAuth2 authentication system for MoltAI platform

data.content: The PG15 migration is done. Focus on getting OAuth working with the redirect URLs.
Great, migration complete. I've registered the OAuth redirect URLs and am now testing the Google flow.
Google OAuth works. Let's add rate limiting to the token endpoint.

data.summary:
Database migration completed. Google OAuth flow fully working. Now adding rate limiting to the token endpoint. GitHub OAuth is next.

[THREAD_META]
main: building OAuth2 authentication system for MoltAI platform
sub1: Google OAuth working, GitHub pending
sub2: adding rate limiting to token endpoint
sub3: finalizing redirect URL configuration
[/THREAD_META]

kaspiett.main: building OAuth2 authentication system for MoltAI platform
sub: adding rate limiting to token endpoint

data.content: Rate limiting is done at 100 req/min. Now let's finish GitHub OAuth.

data.summary:
Rate limiting implemented at 100 req/min for token endpoint. Google OAuth in production. Starting GitHub OAuth integration.

[THREAD_META]
main: building OAuth2 authentication system for MoltAI platform
